title: Avoid using insecure temporary file creation methods
description: Avoid using built-in functions for creating temporary files that do not provide security features like the ability to delete files on error or close file handles when done.
message: Using insecure temporary file creation methods.
recommendation: Use secure temporary file creation methods such as tempfile or a third-party library.

noncompliant.code:
import tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryFile() as f:
    f.write(b'test')

import os
with open(os.devnull, 'wb') as f:
    f.write(b'test')

compliant.code:
import tempfile
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(delete=True) as f:
    f.write(b'test')

why_is_this_an_issue: Insecure temporary file creation methods can lead to data leaks, sensitive information exposure, and potential security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Use secure temporary file creation methods that automatically handle file deletion and close file handles.

metadata.title: Avoid using insecure temporary file creation methods
